title: lantana sandersii var. sandersii
intro: Lantana sandersii var. sandersii, also known as the Puerto Rican lantana, is a plant species within the verbena family (Verbenaceae) native to the island of Puerto Rico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, and its extracts have been found to possess antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and prevent infections. Lantana sandersii var. sandersii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
